title: Command Clear Round Cord Clips, 4 Clips and 5 Adhesive Strips, Transparent - Damage Free Hanging - Hanging Lights and Cable Management
features: DAMAGE-FREE HANGING: Say goodbye to holes or sticky residue on your walls; Command Adhesive Strips by 3M are easy to use and help keep your walls without any marks
NO TOOLS REQUIRED: Easy to apply, no need for nails, screws or drills
STRONG AND VERSATILE- Stick to many surfaces, including paint, wood, tile and more

REMOVES CLEANLY: These cord clips leave no sticky adhesive behind; Thanks to the Command stretch-release removable adhesive technology, they hold strongly yet you can remove them without leaving traces or glue residue
Optimal for entertainment areas and offices to keep cables and wires safe and organised
